title: Warm Spicy Chinese Chicken Noodles
description: A jammy, springy, lazy-sunday Chinese dish featuring dried chillies and a deglaze-fond, suitable for diabetics. This dish is best served on a lazy-susan-spinner for a fun and interactive meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crushed dried chillies to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the noodles and sauce.
Drizzle with sesame oil and sprinkle with chopped scallions.
